# scripts/

Utility scripts for MDL baseline tooling.

## Scripts

| Script | Purpose | Usage |
|--------|---------|-------|
| `index_docs.py` | Build the Docs-RAG vector index from `Docs/` | `python3 scripts/index_docs.py` |

## Adding Scripts

Place new automation scripts here. Use Python for data/indexing tasks, Bash for simple orchestration.
